public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as assistant curator.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a assistant curator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of assistant curator in and around Threads of Twilight Market, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Threads of Twilight Market workable through the obligations of assistant curator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Threads of Twilight Market, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of assistant curator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kest March can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Kest March needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Threads of Twilight Market.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Kest March communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Threads of Twilight Market: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
